home.title: Bernabei Automobili | Premium Cars in Rome
home.description: Exclusive selection of premium and sports cars in Rome. Since 1946, three generations of enthusiasts.

chiSiamo.title: Since 1946, Three Generations — About Us
chiSiamo.description: Three generations of passion for cars. From our grandfather, first Ferrari dealer in Central-Southern Italy, to Brando today at Via Flaminia 318, Rome.

vetture.title: Premium & Sports Cars Rome — Available Now
vetture.description: Selection of premium and sports cars in Rome. Every car verified, guaranteed, with documented history.

servizi.title: Trade-in, Warranty, Financing — Services
servizi.description: Personalised consultation, trade-in, financing, warranty and delivery throughout Italy.

contatti.title: Contact — Via Flaminia 318, Rome
contatti.description: Contact Bernabei Automobili: phone, WhatsApp, email or contact form. Via Flaminia 318/a, Rome.

hero.subtitle: Those who come to Bernabei aren't just looking for a car, they're looking for someone they can trust.

pillars.title: Selection
pillars.description: Every car enters our stock only after a personal inspection. We never buy sight unseen: quality is verified in person.

pillars.title: Transparency
pillars.description: Every defect, every service, every history of the car is communicated before negotiation. No surprises, ever.

pillars.title: Expertise
pillars.description: Over 80 years of family history in the luxury car sector, three generations of hands-on expertise.

pillars.title: Relationship
pillars.description: We don't sell you a car. We help you choose one. And we remain available long after delivery.

method.title: The Bernabei Method
method.subtitle: A rigorous process that guarantees quality and transparency at every stage.

steps.title: Selection
steps.description: Every car is personally evaluated. Documented history, verified provenance, mechanical conditions assessed.

steps.title: Verification
steps.description: In-depth technical inspection by specialists. Certified mileage, bodywork, systems, service history.

steps.title: Preparation
steps.description: Professional detailing, service if needed, complete sanitisation. The car is delivered as it should be.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Detailed explanation of the car, documents in order, warranty active. After-sales support starts here.

autoscout.title: Follow us on AutoScout24
autoscout.subtitle: Browse our complete inventory, read verified client reviews and discover available cars in real time.
autoscout.quote: Finally a serious dealer. Total transparency, no pressure.

cta.quote: When a client contacts me, I don't see a sale. I see a person about to make an important investment who deserves my full attention.
cta.subtitle: Found the right car or want advice? Contact me directly. No intermediaries, no commercial pressure.

footer.description: Careful selection of premium and sports cars. Transparency, expertise and personalised assistance.

chiSiamo.p1pre: The story of Bernabei Automobili begins in
chiSiamo.p1strong: first Ferrari dealer in Central-Southern Italy
chiSiamo.p1post: , finishing second at the Mille Miglia, behind only Nuvolari, a lifelong friend of his.
chiSiamo.p2pre: His son Franco carried on with the same passion: Maserati and De Tomaso dealer,
chiSiamo.p2post: , with several Formula 1 appearances. Cars weren't just a trade, they were a vocation.
chiSiamo.p3pre: Today Brando, third generation, carries forward that same identity at Via Flaminia 318, Rome.
chiSiamo.p3strong: Before being a dealer, he's an enthusiast.
chiSiamo.p3post: That's why every car is selected, verified and presented with the care it deserves, and why our clients come from all over Italy and Europe.

timeline.desc: First Ferrari dealer in Central-Southern Italy. Mille Miglia driver, friend of Nuvolari.
Maserati and De Tomaso dealer. 3× Italian Formula 3 champion. Formula 1 appearances.
Economics degree, MBA, 4 languages. Via Flaminia 318, Rome. Clients across Europe.

vetture.title: Available cars
vetture.subtitle: Every car is personally selected, verified and prepared. Quality without compromise.
vetture.notFound: Can't find what you're looking for?
vetture.notFoundSub: Browse our complete inventory on AutoScout24, or contact us for a personalised search across the European market.

servizi.title: Everything you need
servizi.subtitle: Complete assistance that accompanies you before, during and after purchase. Choosing Bernabei means choosing peace of mind.
servizi.faqSub: We're available for any clarification. Contact us with no obligation.

services.title: Custom Search
services.description: Can't find the car of your dreams? Trust us. We search for the perfect car across the entire European market, with a personal inspection before purchase.
features: Detailed report with photos and video
No cost if you don't find the right car

services.title: Trade-in
services.description: Already have a car? We evaluate it seriously and transparently. Clear quote, complete transfer management. No surprises.

services.title: Financing & Leasing
services.description: Personalised financing solutions with selected institutions. We manage the process directly, from application to signing.

services.title: Warranty
services.description: All our cars come with a warranty. Not because the law requires it, but because it's the minimum you can expect from a serious professional.

services.title: Italy-wide Delivery
services.description: Wherever you are, we'll reach you. We deliver your new car directly to your door anywhere in Italy, with trusted transporters.

services.title: After-Sales Support
services.description: Our relationship doesn't end with the sale. We're always available for any need, months after purchase.

contatti.title: Let's talk about your next car
contatti.subtitle: I'm available for any questions. Contact me with no obligation, I'll be happy to help.
contatti.appointmentNote: * Visits by appointment also outside hours
contatti.formPrivacy: * Required fields. Your data will be processed in accordance with privacy regulations.
contatti.formSuccessMsg: Thank you for contacting me. I'll reply as soon as possible.
